title: HK Cross-Border Passenger Flow & Holiday Patterns

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total) FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE direction = 'Arrival';
SELECT ROUND(AVG(total)) FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE day_type = 'Public Holiday' AND total > 0;
SELECT ROUND(AVG(total)) FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE day_type = 'Weekday' AND total > 0;

panels.title: Holiday Surge Multiplier vs Weekday
panels.description: How many times busier are control points on Public Holidays vs normal weekdays?

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN day_type = 'Public Holiday' THEN total END)::numeric / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN day_type = 'Weekday' THEN total END), 0), 2) FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE total > 0;

panels.title: Average Daily Passengers by Day Type (All Control Points)
panels.description: Key insight: Public Holidays generate 2.5x more cross-border traffic than weekdays. Processed by Spark MapReduce from IMMD data (2021–2026).

targets.rawSql: SELECT day_type, ROUND(AVG(total)) AS avg_passengers FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE total > 0 GROUP BY day_type ORDER BY avg_passengers DESC;

panels.title: Top Control Points by Total Volume (2021–2026)
panels.description: Cumulative passenger count per border crossing since 2021.

targets.rawSql: SELECT control_point, SUM(total) AS total_passengers FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE total > 0 GROUP BY control_point ORDER BY total_passengers DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Monthly Passenger Trend — Top 4 Control Points
panels.description: Monthly total arrivals at the 4 busiest control points since 2021. Shows COVID recovery and post-pandemic surge.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS time, control_point AS metric, SUM(total) AS value FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE control_point IN ('Lo Wu', 'Lok Ma Chau Spur Line', 'Airport', 'Shenzhen Bay') AND direction = 'Arrival' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date), control_point ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Arrivals vs Departures — Total by Direction
panels.description: Monthly arrivals vs departures across all control points combined.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS time, direction AS metric, SUM(total) AS value FROM passenger_daily_summary GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date), direction ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Visitor Breakdown on Public Holidays
panels.description: Who crosses the border on public holidays? Breakdown by HK Residents, Mainland Visitors, and Other Visitors.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'HK Residents' AS type, SUM(hk_residents) AS total FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE day_type = 'Public Holiday' UNION ALL SELECT 'Mainland Visitors', SUM(mainland_visitors) FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE day_type = 'Public Holiday' UNION ALL SELECT 'Other Visitors', SUM(other_visitors) FROM passenger_daily_summary WHERE day_type = 'Public Holiday';
